target: 5. The Reason for Anger
Dad, two more A-lunches!
Coming right up!
Mio, I'll take this plate.
Yeah, please!
Welcome.
Hey, Shinpei!
Helping out at Kofune today, huh? Working even though you're visiting your hometown, how admirable.
With it being this busy, they need the help. Please, take a seat at the counter over there.
Thanks a lot.
But still, the shop is this busy and even you're working, Shinpei-kun, so is Ushio-chan slacking off?
Yeah, well.
(I haven't seen Ushio since then, but is she really still sleeping...?)
Let me guess, Shinpei-kun... did something happen between you and Ushio-chan?
Eh!? W-Why would you say that...
Actually, I ran into Ushio-chan outside just a little while ago.
Eh, outside?
I just called out to her to say hi, but she glared at me so hard!
She must have been in a terrible mood. And the cause of that is you, isn't it, Shinpei-kun?
Well, you know…
Hm~? You've got a look on your face that says you have an idea.
When she gets like that, you're better off apologizing quickly, you know~?
It's scary when you make a girl mad, after all.
You're right. I'll apologize as soon as she gets back...
(What is this? A strange sense of unease...)
(When she gets back...)
(But... what if she doesn't come back?)
(No, no... What am I thinking?)
(Ushio not coming back... There's no way...)
Shinpei-kun?
U-Um, where... did you see Ushio?
Hm? I saw her around the school. She was walking towards the beach.

(Beach…
The private beach behind the school…)
What's wrong, Shinpei-kun? You've got a really scary look on your face.
(I don't have any proof or anything. But something inside me is telling me that place is no good...)
(Damn it! What is this feeling of unease!?)
He~y, Shinpei-kun?
Mio, Alain, sorry! I have to go after all!
Eh? Shin-chan? What do you mean 'after all'?
Shinpei, what's wrong all of a sudden?

I'm really sorry!
I'll be back soon!
*Pant*, *pant*, *pant*...!
(...There she is!)
Ushio!!
Uhyah!?
What, it's just Shinpei. Don't scare me like that.
I heard that you... might be heading here, so...
I just had this terrible feeling of unease... you know.
...A feeling of unease? You came all the way here just for that?
What's with that. Don't tell me you thought I was going to drown in the sea or something?
A-Ah... I guess so?
Could you not worry about unnecessary things? Don't underestimate my swimming skills.
No, I know that! There's no way I wouldn't know how well you can swim.
Then why would you worry about something so stupid――
Even so!
Even so... I just got so anxious, I had to see your face...
I ended up running out of the shop.
Shinpei…
It's the same again, huh.
What do you mean, the same...
Did you feel it too?
Yeah…
You know, after I went back to sleep, I went out for a walk.
I somehow ended up near the school, and when I thought about going to the private beach...
The beach is dangerous.' 'Don't go near the beach.' I felt that kind of sensation throughout my entire body.
You idiot...! Then don't go near it!
But just being scared of it pisses me off, you know? So I thought I'd find out what was so scary about it.
When we went to Omoto Beach yesterday, I didn't feel anything like that at all, though.
You idiot... Don't make me worry for nothing.
W-What do you mean idiot! I don't think I'm weak enough to need that much worrying over!?
Well, that's...
Haha... well, I guess you're right. You are strong, Ushio.
Why are you laughing!?
But... I'm really glad you're safe.
…Shinpei.
Jeez! What is going on!? It's been nothing but weird things since yesterday!
Yeah, you're right...
It's all been since you came back, Shinpei. Did you do something, Shinpei?
I didn't do anything!
But... this feeling isn't a very pleasant one.
Hey, do you think maybe... It would have been better if I hadn't come back?
Of course not!
Having you back on the island, it just feels right, or rather, I'm happy... it helps me out.
All the anxiety and cloudy feelings that have built up in my heart...
When I take those feelings out on you like we're fighting, I feel refreshed and relieved.
Eh...!? Wait, what do you mean?
Like we're fighting... you...
Actually... I wasn't seriously mad the whole time.
Don't tell me... you were pretending to be mad on purpose!?
Ahaha, well, something like that.
Then, Totsumura-san came to the shop earlier and said you glared at him really hard. What was that about...?
Eh? A-Ah, that time.
Maybe it was because I was having that weird feeling of unease right then? The moment I saw his face, I just got pissed off for some reason.
You'd better apologize later...
*Siiiiigh*...
What's wrong?
The exhaustion just hit me all at once... I ran super fast to get here...
Is that so? You should exercise more regularly.
Leave me alone.
Hey, Shinpei. Are you happy to know I wasn't really mad?
More than happy, I feel relieved from the bottom of my heart...
Sorry about that. I can be nicer to you from now on, you know?
Why are you acting so high and mighty!
Heheh!
Geez...
(Ushio was anxious too, in her own way.)
(If that was the case, I should have been more considerate...)
(No, it would have ended in a fight anyway.)
